match_start: The bell rings and we're underway!
The crowd is electric as the match begins!
Here we go! Both competitors ready for battle.
strike_success: {attacker} connects with a devastating {move}! {defender} staggers backward.
{attacker} lands the {move} flush! The crowd reacts!
A stiff {move} from {attacker} catches {defender} right on the jaw!
strike_critical_success: {attacker} unleashes a BRUTAL {move}! {defender} might be out cold!
OH MY! {attacker} just destroyed {defender} with that {move}!
The crowd explodes as {attacker} connects with a perfect {move}!
strike_failure: {attacker} goes for the {move} but {defender} sees it coming!
grapple_success: {attacker} hoists {defender} up and delivers a powerful {move}!
{defender} is taken down hard with that {move}!
grapple_critical_success: {attacker} SLAMS {defender} with incredible force! What impact!
The canvas shakes as {attacker} delivers a devastating {move}!
{defender} is broken in half by that incredible {move}!
aerial_success: From the top rope! {attacker} hits the {move}!
{attacker} soars through the air with the {move}!
aerial_critical_success: {attacker} FLIES through the air - {move} CONNECTS PERFECTLY! The crowd is on their feet! THIS IS WRESTLING!
UNBELIEVABLE! {attacker} nails the {move} from the top rope! {defender} is DOWN!
INCREDIBLE! {attacker} risks it all and connects with the {move}! The arena is shaking!
aerial_failure: {attacker} goes up top but {defender} rolls out of the way!
Too much hesitation from {attacker} and the opportunity is lost!
aerial_critical_failure: {attacker} goes up top for the {move}... AND CRASHES AND BURNS! That could be a serious injury!
OH NO! {attacker} slips on the top rope - the {move} attempt goes horribly wrong!
DISASTER! {attacker} crashes to the mat! That was scary!
submission_success: {attacker} locks in the {move}! {defender} is in trouble!
The {move} is cinched in tight! Can {defender} escape?
{attacker} has the {move} applied - this could be it!
pin_attempt: Could this be it? {attacker} hooks the leg!
pin_success: The referee counts three! We have a winner!
pin_kickout_early: Kickout at ONE! {defender} is far from done!
A count of one and {defender} is already up!
pin_kickout_late: NO! {defender} gets the shoulder up at the last second!
How did {defender} kick out of that?!
phase_change: The match is heating up as we enter the {phase}!
The intensity increases - it's time for the {phase}!
Here comes the {phase}! Things are getting serious!
comeback_start: {attacker} is starting to fire up! The crowd is behind them!
The momentum is shifting! {attacker} is making a comeback!
{defender} can't keep {attacker} down! The comeback is on!
finish_nearfall: The crowd thought that was it! What a near fall!
HOW DID THEY KICK OUT?! The match continues!
I don't believe it! That was a three count if I've ever seen one!
match_end: An incredible performance by both athletes, but {winner} takes the victory!
